entities.name: Ilya
entities.context: Responsible for refining pricing models and employer-facing materials (two-pager, PDF, talking points)

entities.name: Cost model
entities.context: Incremental cost structure for job applications with distinct per-application costs

entities.name: Vibe check
entities.context: Cheap front-door filter that gates access to expensive per-job analysis

entities.name: Per-job analysis
entities.context: Expensive analysis decomposing roles into ~30 items and running dense alignment

entities.name: Dense alignment
entities.context: Technique for matching decomposed role items against candidate stories and resume

entities.name: Do not flush money principle
entities.context: UI design principle preventing users from repeatedly triggering high-cost analysis without guardrails

entities.name: Vibe-check threshold
entities.context: Cutoff level that candidates must exceed to proceed to high-cost analysis path

relationships.context: Treats clarified per-job costs as constraints when refining pricing models
Vibe check gates access to expensive per-job analysis path
Dense alignment is the core technique within per-job analysis
Principle prevents UI patterns that trigger expensive analysis without guardrails
Threshold determines which candidates pass the vibe check filter
